mapper.select: select hscso.*, hscsg.group_name from hlvr_sop_card hsc left join hlvr_sop_card_step_group hscsg on hsc.id = hscsg.hsc_id left join hlvr_sop_card_step_opt hscso on hscsg.id = hscso.hscsg_id where hsc.id= #{cardId} and hscsg.del_flag = 0 and hscso.del_flag = 0 order by hscsg.indexing, hscso.indexing limit 1

with temp as ( SELECT o.*,g.indexing as 'groupIndex', ROW_NUMBER() OVER (order by g.indexing, o.indexing) AS rn FROM hlvr_sop_card_step_opt o JOIN hlvr_sop_card_step_group g ON g.id = o.hscsg_id and g.del_flag = 0 JOIN hlvr_sop_card_step_group g2 ON g2.hsc_id = g.hsc_id and g2.del_flag = 0 WHERE o.del_flag = 0 and g2.id = (SELECT hscsg_id FROM hlvr_sop_card_step_opt WHERE id = #{currentStepId}) ) select * from temp where del_flag = 0 and rn> (SELECT rn FROM temp WHERE id = #{currentStepId}) limit 1

SELECT * FROM hlvr_sop_card_step_opt hscso JOIN hlvr_sop_card_step_group hscsg ON hscso.hscsg_id = hscsg.id WHERE hscsg.hsc_id = #{cardId} and hscso.del_flag = 0 and hscsg.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY hscsg.indexing ${order}, hscso.indexing ${order};
